import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      sum = sum + n
      count = count + 1
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
